ACHIEVEMENTS

Achievements

🏅

Most Promising Developer — Medal

Awarded the Most Promising Developer medal by RD National College of Arts & Science, Erode. This glowing acrylic medal with a tricolour ribbon recognises outstanding potential and early initiative in the field of development — a proud milestone in the very first year of the BSc Cyber Security programme.

📄

My first Appreciation

I got my first letter pad from the Chairman of RD National College, Erode. It is a memorable milestone in my journey and a source of motivation that inspires me to work harder, stay disciplined, and continue achieving greater success in the future.

⌨

Built a Keyboard Circuit

Designed and assembled a working keyboard circuit from scratch — hands-on hardware experience that complements the cyber security coursework.

PORTFOLIO

Portfolio

A curated showcase of creative and technical work built over the first year — from circuits to video edits, every project reflects a mind that finds the interesting problem hiding inside the obvious one. Each piece here represents a real skill applied to a real challenge, not just coursework completed.

🔐

Cyber Security Foundations

Actively studying network security, ethical hacking fundamentals, and cryptography as part of the BSc Cyber Security programme at RD National College.

🎬

Video Editing

Experienced in post-production workflows — cutting, colour grading, and motion work. Brings a precise eye for timing and visual storytelling to every edit.

🖌️

Logo & Visual Design

Designs logos and visual assets with a focus on clarity and impact. Comfortable translating an idea into a mark that actually communicates something.

💡

Hardware Prototyping

Built a fully functional keyboard circuit from scratch — demonstrating that the interest in security extends all the way down to the physical layer of computing.
